visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a brightly lit warehouse store (Costco) in front of stacks of coffee product boxes. One woman wears a white bucket hat and a black off-shoulder top, while the other has long dark hair and a gray long-sleeved top. They gesture toward a box of UCC Oat Latte. (2) Close-up shot of the UCC Oat Latte box held by the women, highlighting the brand name and product image. (3) A sequence of shots showing the women in an indoor home setting, with a large quantity of individual coffee packets spread out on a table in front of them. They hold the packets and point at them with smiling expressions. (4) A hand is seen placing a large box of the coffee into a red shopping cart at the warehouse. (5) Demonstration of the coffee preparation: powder is poured into a porcelain cup, followed by hot water from a black gooseneck kettle, and then stirred with a decorative gold spoon. (6) The woman in the white hat is seen outdoors on a balcony or patio, wrapped in a blue blanket, sipping from a purple cup and reacting with a joyful, refreshed expression. (7) The other woman is shown at a desk indoors, drinking an iced version of the coffee from a tall glass with a straw while looking at a laptop with stickers on it. (8) The two women are back together in the home setting, holding coffee packets and a finished cup, engaging directly with the camera with high energy and hand gestures.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 好多人都再買. (2) [Slogan]: 香醇燕麥三合一咖啡. [Logo]: UCC. (3) [Variety]: 50入大包裝. (4) [Subtitle]: 喝到日本咖啡專業大廠. (5) [Variety]: 對於素食者 乳糖不耐者. (6) [Slogan]: 都超級友善. (7) [Subtitle]: 價格是429元. (8) [Variety]: 超划算. (9) [Subtitle]: 濃淡自己調整超方便. (10) [Variety]: 暖身體及心情. (11) [Subtitle]: UCC的咖啡味. (12) [Slogan]: 很濃 很香醇. (13) [Subtitle]: 是全家人都會喜歡的三合一咖啡. (14) [Variety]: 獨立包裝. [Slogan]: 攜帶方便. (15) [Variety]: 必買清單. [Slogan]: 不能沒有他.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appear throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a white bucket hat, a black off-shoulder top, and jeans. The other has long black hair and a beige or gray long-sleeved ribbed top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video shifts between a bulk warehouse store environment with high shelving and stacked boxes, and a modern home interior featuring a living room couch, a dining table, and a desk area.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic female vocal starts with a fast speech rate. Upbeat electronic pop BGM begins with a steady synth beat. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' SFX signals a transition as the narration shifts to discussing product availability and packaging size. BGM continues at a consistent tempo. (3) Short 'ding' SFX coincides with the mention of the price. The vocal tone is persuasive and enthusiastic. (4) Audible rustling sound of coffee packets followed by the distinct sound of liquid being poured into a cup. (5) A cartoon-style 'pop' SFX accompanies a positive vocal exclamation during a tasting reaction. (6) Music intensity slightly increases with more percussive elements during the final recommendation and call to action. The vocal delivery becomes highly rhythmic and focused.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Feature Showcase -> Value Proposition -> Usage Demonstration -> Emotional Appeal -> Call to Action.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote the UCC Oat Latte 3-in-1 coffee available at Costco by highlighting its bulk value, suitability for various dietary needs (oat-based), ease of preparation, and the comfort it provides during cold weather.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features a direct product demonstration, mentions specific pricing at a specific retailer (Costco), and includes a strong 'must buy' recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a high-energy social media commercial following a popular vlog-style format, utilizing fast cuts and text overlays to maintain viewer engagement.
